message:
fix(mux): clean up remaining TODO/FIXME comments in vendored mux crate

- tmux.rs: pass "tmux" workspace to new_empty_window instead of None
  (removes TODO: pass session here)
- lib.rs: remove stale FIXME: clipboard? comment in spawn_tab_or_window
  (clipboard is handled at the GUI layer, not the mux layer)
- termwiztermtab.rs: clarify FIXME on Terminal writer to descriptive
  comment (Vec::new sink is correct for TermWiz applets)

Validated: 299 mux tests pass via rch, all downstream crates compile.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
